{{Quote|Good shooting, Norley! Old Tech Sergeant Hooly would be proud of that shot!|Cee Norley, after shooting down an Imperial skimmer|<ref name="AD">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
'''Cee Norley''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] who was trained by [[Tech Sergeant]] [[Hooly]].

==Biography==
Cee Norley was a weapon's expert. During her youth she remembered that her mother was wearing soft scarves. She was trained by [[Tech Sergeant]] [[Hooly]], who insisted on centering on a target while aiming, and not being distracted by annoyances.<ref name="RA" /> She also took multiple fire training.<ref name="AD" />

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], she accompanied [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]] to [[Dorlo]] in order to [[Mission to Dorlo|fetch]] [[Nij Por Ral]]. During the mission their pilot and companion [[Duno Dree]] felt attracted to her.<ref name="RA" />

Upon their escape on their [[Skimmer/Legends|skimmer]], [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] forces intervened and Rahn suggested to continue on foot.
Their pursuers were led by Jerec's [[Seven Dark Jedi|apprentices]], guided by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Maw (Dark Jedi)|Maw]] by [[Force sense/Legends|sensing their fear]].<ref name="RA" /> Norley was always armed with her two [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]], and despite being the only with military training, the trek wore her so much that she insisted to stop. The team took a cover among the trees; Norley criticised Rahn's strategy, as "Druno" was too young, Nij Por Ral was a scholar while [[Rolanda Gron]] was just a technologist.<ref name="AD" />

Norley agreed with Rahn's plan to stay behind and create a diversion, and ambushed their [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] skimmer with her launchers.<ref name="RA" /> Dark Jedi [[Sariss]] momentarily felt her presence, but as Maw failed to sense her waiting there, Sariss supposed that their attacker was trained by Rahn to control fear.<ref name="AD" />

She managed to destroy one of the skimmers, the one carrying twenty [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]].<ref name="AD" /> As she picked up the other tube and aimed against the remaining skimmer, the one carrying the Dark Jedi, it was closing on her. She tried to ignore a disturbance on her shoulder and neck, which proved to be a [[Telekinesis/Legends#Choking powers|Force choke]]; Before being able to shoot at the skimmer, Cee dropped the launcher and desperately clawed at her throat, only to be shot by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] through her chest by [[Sariss]].<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref> Her Dark Jedi companion [[Yun]], continued firing at her, blinded by his rage that anyone dared to ambush Dark Jedi.<ref name="AD" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the audio adaptation of [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'']], she was voiced by [[Virginia Burke]].
